title: How Gong Built a $7B+ Company in the Age of Vibe Coding | Amit Bendov
summary: Amit Bendov, CEO of Gong, argues that software moats depend less on code itself and more on customer context, proprietary data, product experience, and operational complexity. He contends that AI will not eliminate SaaS companies as feared, and emphasizes that the best AI products create devoted users through customer obsession and design excellence.
writeup: Gong CEO Amit Bendov makes the case that software moats rest on customer context, proprietary data, and operational complexity rather than code itself, which reframes what defensibility means in an era when code is cheap to produce. He pushes back on the claim that AI will dismantle SaaS, calling that fear overstated. The takeaway: the strongest AI products build durable customer loyalty rather than merely optimizing for user happiness.
